name: Archery
short_description: Archery - is simple archery game. You need eliminate all balloons and don't let run out arrows
detailed_description:
Archery - is simple archery game. You need eleminate all baloons and dont let run out arrows

Basic rules:

Hold and move on screen to control the angle and power of a shoot. Release to shoot the arrow. Eliminate all the balloons within the limited arrows and do not let any of them fly out of the screen.Some balloon can not be breaked by arrows. So it was interesting to find indirectly way for killing them.

Feathers:
-Lovely music
-Nice graphics
-22 simple levels
-Easy achievements
-Custom achievements
